Event: The Runic Adventure
Event Date: 08/07/2025
Sage Bot Item Code: E47
Jotunns' Whisper Engraving

Enhancement: 1
Once in a while the engraving owner deals 35000 / 47000 / 67200 / 96000 / 128000 / 160000 / 200000 physical damage to all enemy units in a small radius around them and has a 75% chance to frighten each unit for 1 / 1.25 / 1.5 / 1.75 / 2 / 2.25 / 2.5 sec.

Enhancement: 2
11000 Armor from the gems
Once in a while the engraving owner deals 55000 / 70600 / 100800 / 144000 / 192000 / 240000 / 300000 physical damage to all enemy units in a large radius around them and has a 75% chance to frighten each unit for 2 / 2.25 / 2.5 / 2.75 / 3 / 3.25 / 3.5 sec. This damage ignores shields and damage-reducing effects.

Enhancement: 3
22000 Armor from the gems
Once in a while the engraving owner deals 75000 / 94100 / 134400 / 192000 / 256000 / 320000 / 400000 pure damage to all enemy units in a large radius around them and has a 75% chance to frighten each unit for 3 / 3.25 / 3.5 / 3.75 / 4 / 4.25 / 4.5 sec. This damage ignores shields and damage-reducing effects.
